spec_match.rationale: Superb visual representation of MSE buffers with clear modeling of updateend timing, async gaps, and microtask throws.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, allowing users to click segments, input custom limits, and trigger simulated sync and async workflows.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Frames the synchronous transition rules perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes a valid MediaSource capability check on load with appropriate user feedback.

design_system.rationale: Consistent and appealing design matching system conventions.

summary: An exceptionally engaging visual buffer visualizer tool that illustrates the synchronous and asynchronous MediaSource remove mechanics. It features a clean browser capability check but lacks the required ChromeStatus spec link.
